summary: Two "Yolka" air defense drones simultaneously intercepted an enemy fixed-wing UAV in a kinetic strike in the Russian Federation. The Rubicon Center conducted 78,499 sorties in March 2026, destroying 118 targets including 221 UAV control points, 1,798 personnel, and 1,479 engineering structures. Ukrainian operators from the 1st Separate Strike UAS Center, with Defense Intelligence, struck an Orion drone storage facility, aircraft, and radar station in occupied Crimea. A Russian Ka-52 was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk, with the crew eliminated during a crash landing and evacuation attempt.
